Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. TruffleRuby 178 upvotes, 24 comments
  2. TinyLoRA – Learning to Reason in 13 Parameters 224 upvotes, 41 comments
  3. Bring Back MiniDV with This Raspberry Pi FireWire Hat 105 upvotes, 17 comments
  4. MiniStack (replacement for LocalStack) 287 upvotes, 59 comments
  5. CERN levels up with new superconducting karts 319 upvotes, 70 comments
  6. The OpenAI Graveyard: All the Deals and Products That Haven't Happened 32 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. Chess in SQL 144 upvotes, 30 comments
  8. 4D Doom 261 upvotes, 69 comments
  9. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 468 upvotes, 137 comments
  10. Claude Code Unpacked : A visual guide 895 upvotes, 323 comments
  11. Is BGP safe yet? 168 upvotes, 56 comments
  12. Intuiting Pratt Parsing 105 upvotes, 32 comments
  13. Show HN: 1-Bit Bonsai, the First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs 358 upvotes, 137 comments
  14. Show HN: CLI to order groceries via reverse-engineered REWE API (Haskell) 167 upvotes, 67 comments
  15. Claude Wrote a Full FreeBSD Remote Kernel RCE with Root Shell (CVE-2026-4747) 183 upvotes, 75 comments
  16. Consider the Greenland Shark (2020) 59 upvotes, 19 comments
  17. Randomness on Apple Platforms (2024) 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  18. Ada and Spark on ARM Cortex-M – A Tutorial with Arduino and Nucleo Examples 17 upvotes, 3 comments
  19. StepFun 3.5 Flash is #1 cost-effective model for OpenClaw tasks (300 battles) 25 upvotes, 8 comments
  20. The Document Foundation ejects its core developers 36 upvotes, 14 comments
  21. Show HN: Real-time dashboard for Claude Code agent teams 11 upvotes, 2 comments
  22. EmDash – a spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security 76 upvotes, 43 comments
  23. Show HN: Sycamore – next gen Rust web UI library using fine-grained reactivity 75 upvotes, 46 comments
  24. The Finest Swiss Quality Quaternions 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  25. AI has suddenly become more useful to open-source developers 39 upvotes, 29 comments
  26. New patches allow building Linux IPv6-only 82 upvotes, 72 comments
  27. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (April 2026) 47 upvotes, 46 comments
  28. Apple Removes iPhone Vibe Coding App from App Store 31 upvotes, 29 comments
  29. Random numbers, Persian code: A mysterious signal transfixes radio sleuths 45 upvotes, 56 comments
